allow: PowerShell(Get-Command python, python3, node, npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m http.server 8888" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\Xtoy8\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\GitHub\\WoW" -PassThru -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Temp\\server_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Temp\\server_err.txt"; Start-Sleep 2; Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\server_err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $proc.HasExited)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Xtoy8\\AppData\\Roaming\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($py = "C:\\Users\\Xtoy8\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python311\\python.exe"; Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList "-m", "http.server", "7777" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\Xtoy8\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\GitHub\\WoW" -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:7777/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "FAIL: $_" })
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:9222/json" -UseBasicParsing; \($resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\) | Select-Object id, url, webSocketDebuggerUrl)

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Xtoy8\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\GitHub\\WoW"; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "-m","http.server","7778","--bind","127.0.0.1" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:7778/" -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing; $r.StatusCode } catch { "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Xtoy8\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\GitHub\\WoW"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Xtoy8\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\GitHub\\WoW"; python -m http.server 7778 }; Start-Sleep 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:7778/" -TimeoutSec 4 -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "NOT RESPONDING: $_" })
PowerShell(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; py --version 2>&1)

PowerShell($job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Xtoy8\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\GitHub\\WoW"; & "C:\\windows\\py.exe" -m http.server 7778 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:7778/" -TimeoutSec 4 -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "NOT RESPONDING: $_" })
